title: Tnt Limiter
description: A mod that limits the number of tnt rendered by the client to decrease lag with massive tnt explosions by an insane amount
body:
# 💥 Minecraft TNT Explosion Limiter

## Overview
The **TNT Explosion Limiter** has been **fully overhauled** to deliver dramatically improved performance when handling large-scale TNT explosions.  
The latest versions feature a **faster, more efficient explosion unrending system**, allowing for **huge TNT chains** with **minimal FPS impact**.

This mod is designed for players who want **maximum destruction without sacrificing performance**.

---

## 🚀 What’s New (Major Overhaul)
- **Massively improved TNT unrending logic**
  - Explosions are removed **faster and more efficiently**
  - Handles large TNT chains significantly better than previous versions
- **Expanded version support**
  - Fully tested and supported on **Minecraft 1.19 → 1.21.4**
- **New configuration system**
  - ModMenu support has been **removed**
  - Configuration is now handled via an in-game command
- **Persistent settings**
  - Your TNT limit is **saved between reloads and restarts**

---

## ✨ Key Features
- **Limits rendered TNT explosions**
  - Prevents FPS drops during massive explosions
- **Highly configurable**
  - Set a custom explosion render limit using a simple command
- **Always active**
  - Automatically manages TNT explosions in the background
- **Performance-focused**
  - Optimized for extreme TNT usage
- **No gameplay changes**
  - Only affects rendering — vanilla behavior remains intact

---

## ⚙️ Configuration (v1.0.6+)
Starting with **version 1.0.6**, configuration is done via command:
`/maxtnt <number>`

- The value controls **how many TNT explosions can be rendered at once**
- Settings are **automatically saved** and persist between world reloads and game restarts

❌ **ModMenu is no longer supported** in v1.0.6 and newer.

---

## 🧪 Supported Versions
- **Minecraft 1.19 – 1.21.4**
- Actively tested on all supported versions

---

## 📦 Modpack Usage
✔ You **may include this mod in modpacks**  
✔ Credit is required — **mention my username as the mod owner**

❌ **Do NOT claim this mod as your own**

---

## 🧠 Why Use This Mod?
Vanilla Minecraft struggles with large TNT explosions, often causing severe FPS drops or freezes.  
This mod allows you to:
- Build massive TNT contraptions
- Detonate huge explosive chains
- Experiment freely in creative or survival

—all **without performance issues**.

---

## 🧩 Installation
1. Download the mod for your Minecraft version
2. Place the `.jar` file into your `mods` folder
3. Launch Minecraft
4. Use `/maxtnt <number>` to configure

---

## 💣 Final Thoughts
The **TNT Explosion Limiter** lets you push Minecraft’s explosive limits further than ever before.  
With its **new high-performance unrending system**, **modern version support**, and **simple command-based configuration**, it’s the perfect tool for controlled chaos.

Enjoy the explosions — **without the lag**.
